title: senecio barkhausioides
intro: Senecio barkhausioides, also known as the Silver Ragwort or Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Senecio barkhausioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
